title: Spartaco
writer: Jean Ferry, Maria Bory, Gino Visentini
actors: Massimo Girotti, Ludmilla Tchérina, Yves Vincent
plot: 74 B.C. Somewhere in the Roman Empire, Spartacus, a young officer, is condemned to be a slave because he hit a superior. Brought back to Roma in a gladiators' school, he escapes and stirs up all the slaves in a revolt against the ...
